'''鈭歵h-n-z-d''' ('''kathanzedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:times|times]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:times|times]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-n-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| kathanzedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithanzedoko|thithanzedoko]] || [[word:jithanzedoko|jithanzedoko]] || [[word:shithanzedoko|shithanzedoko]] || [[word:kithanzedoko|kithanzedoko]]
